title: test/apiv2: adapt apiv2 test on cgroups v1 environment
body:
Some apiv2 tests are not support on cgroups v1 environment.

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]". That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
If no, just write `None` in the release-note block below. If yes, a release note
is required: Enter your extended release note in the block below. If the PR
requires additional action from users switching to the new release, include the
string "action required".

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:
https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/release-notes.md
-->

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
Thank you for your review. I fixed the tests.
I verified that the cgroups v1 system passes the tests.

- root cgroups v1

```
ok 341 [20-containers] POST exec/a2ad45cd5d7ec0defed467b4be3f315c8daca0733c04778ffb7fae33df48c8b1/start [-d {}] : status=200
ok 342 [20-containers] POST exec/a2ad45cd5d7ec0defed467b4be3f315c8daca0733c04778ffb7fae33df48c8b1/start [-d {}] : output=^A^D123
```

- rootless cgroups v1

```
ok 97 [20-containers] POST libpod/commit?container=7be1369550b1&repo=newrepo&tag=v2&comment=bar&author=eric&format=docker&changes=CMD=/bin/foo&pause=true [-d {}] : .cause=this container does not have a cgroup
ok 98 [20-containers] POST libpod/commit?container=7be1369550b1&repo=newrepo&tag=v2&comment=bar&author=eric&format=docker&changes=CMD=/bin/foo&pause=true [-d {}] : .message ('CommitFailure: pausing container "7be1369550b17224e3a5324c383cba9642ee97fd0e5d2a17c9e86d0a1d74c8f0" to commit: can not pause containers on rootless containers with cgroup V1: this container does not have a cgroup') ~ .*pause containers on rootless containers with cgroup V1

ok 3 [25-containersMore] POST libpod/containers/foo/pause [-d {}] : status=500
ok 4 [25-containersMore] POST libpod/containers/foo/pause [-d {}] : .cause=this container does not have a cgroup
ok 5 [25-containersMore] POST libpod/containers/foo/pause [-d {}] : .message ('can not pause containers on rootless containers with cgroup V1: this container does not have a cgroup') ~ .*pause containers on rootless containers with cgroup V1
ok 6 [25-containersMore] POST libpod/containers/foo/unpause [-d {}] : status=500
ok 7 [25-containersMore] POST libpod/containers/foo/unpause [-d {}] : .cause=container state improper
ok 8 [25-containersMore] POST libpod/containers/foo/unpause [-d {}] : .message ('"4b66f0c6770ec60f0a51a1c6c44f4b1e13080df161a1f9904a73edfbe922355d" is not paused, can't unpause: container state improper') ~ .*is not paused, can't unpause: container state improper

ok 73 [40-pods] GET libpod/pods/stats?all=true : .cause=pod stats is not supported in rootless mode without cgroups v2
ok 74 [40-pods] GET libpod/pods/stats?all=true : .message ('pod stats is not supported in rootless mode without cgroups v2') ~ pod stats is not supported in rootless mode without cgroups v2
```

/lgtm
/hold

Thank you @sstosh! Placing hold just to give a chance for more eyeballs.
